product: Materialized View and Streaming Table Refreshes
tagline: Now supports standard performance mode for refreshes in jobs.
what_it_does: The update allows materialized view and streaming table refreshes orchestrated through SQL tasks in Lakeflow jobs to utilize the job's performance optimization settings. When performance optimization is disabled, these refreshes will operate in standard performance mode, which reduces the consumption of Databricks Units (DBUs). This feature enhances the flexibility of scheduling refreshes based on performance needs.
why_it_matters: This enhancement is significant for organizations looking to optimize their cloud costs by reducing DBU consumption during less critical refresh operations. It allows data teams to balance performance and cost, ensuring that resources are allocated efficiently while maintaining data freshness.

capabilities.title: Performance Mode Selection
capabilities.desc: Users can select between performance optimized and standard performance modes for refreshes.

capabilities.title: Job Integration
capabilities.desc: Refreshes can be orchestrated as part of existing Lakeflow jobs.

capabilities.title: Cost Efficiency
capabilities.desc: Standard performance mode consumes fewer DBUs, lowering operational costs.

capabilities.title: Flexible Scheduling
capabilities.desc: Supports various scheduling methods including manual, trigger on update, and time-based schedules.

use_cases: Cost-sensitive environments where DBU consumption needs to be minimized.
Scheduled refreshes for data pipelines with varying performance needs.
Integrating refresh tasks into complex job orchestration workflows.

steps.title: Access Job Settings
steps.desc: Navigate to the job settings in the Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Select Performance Mode
steps.desc: Choose the desired performance mode for the job.

steps.title: Schedule Refresh
steps.desc: Define the refresh schedule using SQL tasks.

steps.title: Monitor Refresh Status
steps.desc: Use the UI or SQL commands to track the refresh status.

steps.title: Adjust as Necessary
steps.desc: Modify the performance mode or schedule based on operational needs.

key_takeaway: The introduction of standard performance mode for refreshes enhances cost efficiency and flexibility in data pipeline management.
